# Architecture

## What This Project Does
A weekly mosquito surveillance pipeline for West Nile Virus (WNV) and St. Louis Encephalitis Virus (SLEV) monitoring in Culex mosquitoes in Boulder County / Fort Collins, Colorado. It ingests lab data (qPCR Ct values, trap counts, pool test results) from Google Drive, cleans and validates it, computes epidemiological indices (abundance, pooled infection rate, virus index), and outputs a formatted Excel report plus CSVs and plots for public health epidemiologists.

## Entry Points

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| [`config/run_config.sh`](../../config/run_config.sh) | **Run first.** Calls `config_weekly.R` with CLI args; writes timestamped `.RData` config snapshot |
| [`config/config_weekly.R`](../../config/config_weekly.R) | Parses `--week`, `--year`, thresholds, Google Sheet IDs, zone defs; saves to `config/config_weekly_settings/` |
| [`wnv-s_weekly_report_pipeline_v2.qmd`](../../wnv-s_weekly_report_pipeline_v2.qmd) | **Main pipeline.** ~30 sequential chunks: load config → ingest → clean → calculate → plot → export |
| [`wnv-s_calc_hx.qmd`](../../wnv-s_calc_hx.qmd) | Supplementary: calculates multi-year historical statistics for longitudinal comparisons |
| [`shiny_hx_stats/app.R`](../../shiny_hx_stats/app.R) | Optional Shiny app for interactive exploration of historical data |

## Components

### 1. Configuration (`config/`)
- `config_weekly.R` — parses CLI flags, defines all parameters (paths, thresholds, zone levels, Google Sheet keys, colour palettes), saves `.RData`
- `config_hx.R` — historical-specific config used by `wnv-s_calc_hx.qmd`
- `load_packages.R` — centralised package loading
- `run_config.sh` — wrapper to call `config_weekly.R` from shell

### 2. Data Ingestion (`utils/fun_read_*.R`)
Seven functions that read raw Excel/CSV inputs and download from Google Drive:
- `read_pcr()` — Quantstudio3 qPCR output (`.xls`)
- `read_platemap()` — well-to-pool-ID mapping CSV
- `read_list()` — reads multiple files matching a pattern
- `read_latest()` — loads the most recent `.RData` checkpoint
- `gdrive_download()` / `gsheet_pull_prompt()` — Google Drive / Sheets API downloads

### 3. Data Cleaning (`utils/fun_clean_*.R`)
Nine functions that standardise, rename, deduplicate, and validate:
- `wnv_s_clean()` — master cleaner for surveillance datasheets
- `clean_pcr()` — extracts year/week/plate from filename, converts Cq → copies, assigns test code
- `clean_platemap()` — renames columns via lookup table
- `clean_standards()` — separates qPCR standards/controls; validates
- `clean_4_weekly_input()` — final format coercion before downstream stats

### 4. Statistical Calculations (`utils/fun_calc_*.R`)
Eight functions:
- `calc_abund()` — mosquito abundance (count/trap-night, 95% CI) by zone/species/week
- `calc_pir()` — Pooled Infection Rate via CDC `PooledInfRate` MLE with bootstrap CI
- `calc_vi()` — Virus Index = infection_rate × abundance
- `calc_vi_stats()`, `calc_pools()`, `calc_all()`, `calc_stats_grp()`, `get_trap_n()`

### 5. Merging & Integration (`utils/fun_merge_*.R`)
- `merge_pcr_platemap()` — joins Cq/copies to pool IDs
- `merge_4_database()` — three-way merge: datasheet + PCR + platemap; validates coverage
- `diffs_by_col()` — QC utility to detect row-level changes between old and new data

### 6. Visualisation (`utils/fun_plot_*.R` and `0_R/plot_birds.R`)
- `plot_pcr()` — Cq vs. copy-number scatter with threshold line
- `plot_std()` — standard curve visualisation
- `plot_hx()` — historical (grey) vs. current (colour) trend lines by zone/species
- Bird-related plots in `0_R/plot_birds.R`

### 7. Database Update (`utils/`)
- `update_gsheet()` — pushes new rows back to the master Google Sheet database

### 8. Outputs (`3_output/`)
- `weekly_report_output.xlsx` — primary Excel deliverable for epidemiologists
- `table1a/1b/2a/2b/3a/3b.csv` — abundance, PIR, VI tables + historical comparisons
- `plots/y{year}_w{week}/` — PNG visualisations

## How Components Connect

```
run_config.sh
    └── config_weekly.R  →  config_weekly_settings/y{year}_w{week}_*.RData
                                          │
                                          ▼
               wnv-s_weekly_report_pipeline_v2.qmd
                │
                ├── Google Drive/Sheets ──► fun_read_*.R ──► 1_input/wXX/
                │
                ├── read + clean (fun_read_*.R, fun_clean_*.R)
                │       └── checkpoints ──► 2_mid/y{year}_w{week}_*.RData
                │
                ├── merge (fun_merge_*.R) ──► pool-level database
                │
                ├── calculate (fun_calc_*.R) ──► abund / PIR / VI objects
                │
                ├── plot (fun_plot_*.R) ──► 3_output/plots/
                │
                └── export (openxlsx) ──► 3_output/weekly_report_output.xlsx
                                          3_output/table*.csv
```
